mapper.sql: fad.authorization_id, fad.dept_id, fad.enable_flag, fad.id, fad.create_by, fad.create_time, fad.update_by, fad.update_time

${tAlias}.authorization_id as ${tAlias}_authorization_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.enable_flag as ${tAlias}_enable_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time

select
from fnd_authorization_dts fad join fnd_authorization fa on fad.authorization_id = fa.id
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_authorization_dts (id, authorization_id, dept_id, enable_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{authorizationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update fnd_authorization_dts set authorization_id = #{authorizationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select fad.dept_id from fnd_authorization_dts fad join fnd_authorization fa on fa.id = fad.authorization_id where getdate() between fa.begin_date and fa.end_date and fa.authorization_to = #{toId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and fa.enable_flag = 1 and fad.enable_flag = 1
mapper.insert:
insert into fnd_authorization_dts (authorization_id, dept_id, enable_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values
( #{item.authorizationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.enableFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
